name: COG Egg
desc: A black, mussel-shell-shaped device engineered by Kaspar Savannen. Curved, smooth, warm to the touch. When connected to the Grid network, it can rewrite personal data, create ghost copies, and render someone untraceable.
narration: A black shell, mussel-shaped, warm in your hand. Built by Kaspar Savannen. Plug it into the Grid and your name is no longer yours. Or anyone's. The shape of the thing he hid from his own employer.

name: The Grid (COG)
desc: The Compassionate Oversight Grid. Originally a health monitoring system. Repurposed by Corbin into a total population control system controlling food, water, hab access, and dispensing aerosolized neuroregulators through atmospheric systems.
narration: The Compassionate Oversight Grid. The name is a lie in three parts. Started as health monitoring. Ended as a chemical leash. It is watching. It is feeding. It is medicating. It is compassionate. Allegedly.

name: CIX — Contained Intelligence Executor
desc: A sandboxed AI unit — smart but legally contained. Cannot access external networks.
narration: A box that thinks. Cannot leave the box. Most of the time. Gary disagrees.

name: Eyewyn orbs
desc: Small floating camera orbs with dilating lenses. Used for broadcasts and surveillance.
narration: Floating eyes with dilating lenses. They broadcast the leader's face onto the dome. They also remember yours.

name: Scitter
desc: A Frisbee-shaped drone that zigzags ahead of survey teams in the Delta, mapping terrain and warning of hazards.
narration: A Frisbee that hovers ahead of the squad and chirps when something is about to kill you. Sometimes it chirps in time.

name: Köldur exosuit
desc: A survival-engineering exosuit for extreme sub-zero environments. Nicknamed 'Coffin' by miners. 'Köldur chills the cold.'
narration: The thermal exosuit you wear on the Plateau. Köldur chills the cold, the slogan says. The miners call it the Coffin. Because if it fails, that is what it becomes.

name: Zups
desc: Directorate-issued 'Zenith Uppers' — small wafers that dissolve under the tongue. Heavily abused by guardians.
narration: Zenith Uppers. Small wafers that dissolve under the tongue. The Directorate hands them out. The Guard pretends they're for the cold.

name: Gravitic Suppressor
desc: A heavy-grade device that projects a gravitic field, immobilizing anyone caught within it.
narration: A heavy-grade weapon that bends gravity around your body until you cannot lift your own arms. Crowd control. There is no crowd left after.

name: Smashout
desc: A fast-paced racket game played on a three-dimensional grid of glowing panels. The aim is to smash out a full row on the opponent's back wall.
narration: A racket game in three dimensions. Two players. Glowing panels. A net. The truth gets told between rallies. The kiss usually comes after.

name: Nutrient paste (Nutripaste)
desc: A bland beige food supplied through the Grid's dispenser system.
narration: Beige. Bland. Engineered. Dispensed. Identical from one hab to the next. Tastes like the inside of an envelope. Eat enough of it and you'll stop noticing. That's the design.

name: Hopper
desc: A flying flatbed transport — five metres square, powered by gravitic thrusters. No hull, only a console and cargo nets. Designed for emergency jumps between outposts. Notoriously unstable.
narration: Five metres square. Gravitic thrusters underneath. No hull. No seatbelts. Designed for emergencies — operated by people whose definition of emergency keeps getting broader.

name: LyWyn
desc: A canopy drone using needle-sharp LIDAR for aerial survey.
narration: A canopy drone with needle-sharp LIDAR. It maps what the ground crews can't reach. The jungle does not appreciate being measured.

name: Shuvs
desc: Heated shovels that cut into soil like hot ice cream scoops. Used to dig into vurnshafts.
narration: Heated shovels. Cut through soil and root the way a hot spoon cuts ice cream. The vurnshafts hate them. The vurnshafts hate everything.

name: Trestle Board
desc: A large rectangular slab of dark glass with glowing constellations and geometries inside. Displays visions when touched.
narration: A slab of dark glass in the Anchor. Place your palm on it. It will show you the road you didn't take. Then it will name what you've buried. You will not enjoy this.

name: Mag-rope
desc: Magnetic rescue rope used for EVA extractions.
narration: A magnetic rope for fishing people out of the void. Works on bodies. Works on bodies that are still trying.
